prompt:
A museum-grade mixed-media trophy celebrating full v3 completion, featuring a matte white geometric 3D printed spine rising from a hand-oiled pine pedestal with inset brass fasteners. Around the center is a translucent circular LED halo glowing softly through engraved circuit-like motifs, while a brushed metal crest mounted near the top appears ready to rotate on a hidden servo mechanism. Neatly loomed internal wiring, small debug pads, and a compact hydroponic basil planter crown at the top add a striking blend of precision fabrication, electronics, and living growth.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a premium near-future solarpunk trophy aesthetic: warm wood grain balanced against cool electronic highlights, soft cinematic lighting, subtle workshop-gallery background, no logos, no readable text, and no identifiable faces. The composition should be elegant and iconic, with the full award centered and clearly legible as a singular high-tier DSPACE artifact.
